<js>
var h="https://gitee.com";
var i=h+"/lyc486/yuedu/raw/master/favicon.svg";
if (baseUrl.includes('main/apks')) {
if (Math.random()<0.5) gengxin();
let m='https://miaogongzi.lanzout.com/';
let [webr,webg] = java.ajaxAll([m+'b01rgkhhe',h+'/api/v5/repos/lyc486/legado/releases/latest']).map(x=>x.body());

eval(webr.match(/var pgs;(?:\s*.+){3}/)[0]);
eval('var obj={'+webr.match(/data :\s*\{[^}]+\}/)+'}');
let body = Object.entries(obj.data)
.map(([key, value]) => `${key}=${value}`)
.join('&');
webr = java.ajax(m+'filemoreajax.php'+`,{"method":"POST","body":"${body}"}`);
webr = com.jayway.jsonpath.JsonPath.read(webr,'$.text[*]');

webg = com.jayway.jsonpath.JsonPath.parse(webg);
let ls=webg.read('$.created_at');
ls=java.timeFormat(new Date(ls));
let lb=webg.read('$..assets[0:2]');
result=java.getElement('$..blobs[*]');
	[{
		n:'主页',
		t:'个人网页',
		i:i,
		u:'data:;base64,QQ,{"type":"url"}'
}].concat(
Array.from(lb).map((x,y)=>{
	let n=x.name;
	let url=`@js:'data:;base64,${java.base64Encode(x.browser_download_url)},{"type":"url"}'`;
return {
		n:n.includes('.apk')?('洛娅橙·改：'+n):'',
		t:ls,
		i:i,
        u:url};
})
,
Array.from(result).map(x=>{
	let n=x.name;
	let t=x.last_commit.time;
	return {
		n:n.includes('.apk')?n:'',
		t:t?java.timeFormat(new Date(t)):'',
		i:i,	u:`@js:'data:;base64,${java.base64Encode(x.url)},{"type":"url"}'`};
}).reverse()
,
Array.from(webr).map(x=>{
	return {
		n:x.name_all,
		t:'喵公子 蓝奏云 '+x.time,
		i:i,
		u:m+x.id};
}))
} else {
result=java.getElement('$..trees[*]');
Array.from(result).map(x=>{
	return {
		n:x.name,
		t:java.timeFormat(new Date(x.last_commit.time)),
		i:i,
		u:h+x.url};
})
}
</js>

<js>
let banben="2.2.5";
source.put('bb',banben);
java.toast('\n欢迎🎉');
let url = 'https://gitee.com/lyc486/yuedu2/tree/main';
let rr = java.ajax(url);
let nm = com.jayway.jsonpath.JsonPath.read(rr, "$..trees[*].name");
let ur = com.jayway.jsonpath.JsonPath.read(rr, '$..trees[*].url');
let re = '首页::https://gitee.com/lyc486/yuedu2/tree/main/apks\n';
for (let i = 0, j = 0; i < nm.length; i++) {
	let tt=nm[i];
if (/^[一-ꀀ]/.test(tt)) {
j++;re+=tt+'::https://gitee.com'+ur[i]+'\n';}
}
Packages.java.lang.Thread.sleep(100);
re
</js>

ruleArticles:
<js>
json=[];
if(baseUrl.match(/★/)){
list=baseUrl.replace(/http.*?wd=\s*/,'').split('★');
for(i in list){
href=list[i].match(/【(.*?)】/)[1];
text=list[i].match(/《(.*?)》/)[1];
intro=list[i].match(/◎(.*?)◎/)[1];
index=list[i].match(/^(\d+、\d+、)/)?list[i].match(/^(\d+、\d+、)/)[1]:list[i].match(/^(.*?)【/)[1]
json.push({text:text,src:href,intro:intro,index:index})
}
}
JSON.stringify(json)</js>
$.[*]

ruleArticles:
<js>
  json=[];
  if(baseUrl.match(/★/)){
  list=baseUrl.replace(/http.*?wd=\s*/,'').split('★');
  for(i in list){
  href=list[i].match(/【(.*?)】/)[1];
  text=list[i].match(/《(.*?)》/)[1];
  intro=list[i].match(/◎(.*?)◎/)[1];
  indexUrl=list[i].match(/^(\d+、\d+、)/)?list[i].match(/^(\d+、\d+、)/)[1]:list[i].match(/^(.*?)【/)[1]
   if(indexUrl.indexOf('https://xiang-shiwang.gitee.io')!=-1 || indexUrl.indexOf('http://xiang-shiwang.gitee.io')!=-1){
       if(indexUrl.indexOf('?')==-1){
           indexUrl+='?v='+new Date().getTime()
       }else{
            indexUrl+='?&='+new Date().getTime()
       }
   }
  json.push({text:text,src:href,intro:intro,index:indexUrl})
  }
  }
  JSON.stringify(json)</js>
